generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers the default behavior of the isEmail validator, ensuring standard email formats are validated and non-string inputs throw errors.

generated_categories.name: Display Name Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the handling of display names in email addresses, including allowing or requiring display names.

generated_categories.name: IP Domain Handling
generated_categories.description: Validates email addresses with IP domains when the allow_ip_domain option is enabled.

generated_categories.name: UTF-8 Local Part Restrictions
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior when UTF-8 characters in the local part of the email are disallowed.

generated_categories.name: Character Blacklisting
generated_categories.description: Validates the behavior of the validator when specific characters are blacklisted in the local part of the email.

generated_categories.name: Host Blacklisting
generated_categories.description: Ensures that emails with blacklisted domains are correctly invalidated.
